ddls:
CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "facility_type" INTEGER /* Type of the facility (e.g., RRC, USP, FCI) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the facility is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the facility is located */,
  "uri" TEXT /* URI for the facility's official webpage */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of inmates the facility can hold */,
  "current_population" INTEGER /* Current number of inmates in the facility */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for facility administration */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for facility administration */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last health and safety inspection */,
  "inspection_report" TEXT /* URI to the latest inspection report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facilities_facility_type FOREIGN KEY ("facility_type") REFERENCES facility_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facilities_city FOREIGN KEY ("city") REFERENCES cities ("city_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record of health statistics */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility associated with the statistics */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the statistics were recorded */,
  "inmates_positive" INTEGER /* Number of inmates who tested positive for a disease */,
  "staff_positive" INTEGER /* Number of staff who tested positive for a disease */,
  "inmate_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of inmate deaths recorded */,
  "staff_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of staff deaths recorded */,
  "inmates_recovered" INTEGER /* Number of inmates who recovered from a disease */,
  "staff_recovered" INTEGER /* Number of staff who recovered from a disease */,
  "inmates_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Number of inmates who have been vaccinated */,
  "staff_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Number of staff who have been vaccinated */,
  "inmates_in_quarantine" INTEGER /* Number of inmates in quarantine */,
  "staff_in_quarantine" INTEGER /* Number of staff in quarantine */,
  "inmates_hospitalized" INTEGER /* Number of inmates hospitalized */,
  "staff_hospitalized" INTEGER /* Number of staff hospitalized */,
  "inmates_tested" INTEGER /* Number of inmates tested for diseases */,
  "staff_tested" INTEGER /* Number of staff tested for diseases */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_statistics_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, health official) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last user login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility related to the access */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access device */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., administrator, health official) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility type (e.g., RRC, USP, FCI) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the facility type */,
  "max_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity for facilities of this type */,
  "common_issues" TEXT /* Common health and safety issues for facilities of this type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "health_department" TEXT /* Name of the local health department */,
  "health_department_uri" TEXT /* URI to the local health department's official webpage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)
